projects.title: Adaptive AI Agent Platform
projects.role: My role · AI/ML engineer — multi-agent orchestration, FastAPI backend, and Streamlit UI
projects.desc: Multi-agent workspace using LangGraph to orchestrate Gemini and OpenAI models, with dynamic web search routing for complex user queries.
projects.problem: Single-model assistants struggle to route open-ended queries to the right tools or web search, which leads to incomplete answers.
projects.approach: LangGraph multi-agent workspace with Gemini and OpenAI, dynamic web search extensions, FastAPI backend, and Streamlit UI.
projects.impact: End-to-end agent platform with intelligent query routing and a deployable FastAPI + Streamlit stack.

projects.title: MediLens AI Knowledge Engine
projects.role: My role · AI/ML engineer — RAG pipeline, vector search, and multimodal healthcare QA
projects.desc: RAG architecture indexing medical textbooks and publications, using LLaMA 3.3 and Gemini Vision for multimodal healthcare question answering.
projects.problem: Healthcare teams need trustworthy answers from large medical corpora, including text and visual clinical inputs.
projects.approach: RAG stack with FAISS vector search over indexed medical sources, LLaMA 3.3 for generation, and Gemini Vision for image-based queries.
projects.impact: Multimodal healthcare QA system with retrieval over a structured medical knowledge base.

projects.title: VoiceVision Healthcare AI
projects.role: My role · AI/ML engineer — speech, computer vision, and LLM integration
projects.desc: Multimodal healthcare interface that combines speech recognition with computer vision models for consolidated diagnostic workflows.
projects.problem: Clinical workflows often split voice notes and visual diagnostics across separate tools, slowing integration work.
projects.approach: Unified interface merging speech recognition, computer vision, and LLM inference with local and cloud deployment options.
projects.impact: Single pipeline that brings voice, vision, and language models together for healthcare use cases.

moreWorkProjects.title: World Atlas
moreWorkProjects.name: world_Atlas
moreWorkProjects.desc: Responsive World Atlas web application that displays country information including population, capital, languages, flags, and regional details with search and filtering capabilities.

moreWorkProjects.title: Speech Recognition
moreWorkProjects.name: speech_recognation
moreWorkProjects.desc: Speech-to-text application that converts spoken audio into text in real time using Python speech recognition libraries, improving accessibility and voice-based interactions.

moreWorkProjects.title: Task Flow
moreWorkProjects.name: Task-Flow
moreWorkProjects.desc: Full-stack task management application with secure JWT authentication. Users can register, log in, create and manage tasks, and build flashcards — deployed with a Next.js frontend and Node.js + Express + MongoDB backend.
